target_behavior.notes: Left-side junction: splits into two diagonal branches. One extends toward the upper-left (-X, +Y) and one toward the lower-left (-X, -Y). Both paths should have smooth Y-shaped transitions.
Main central pipe passage connecting the left and right branching junctions.
Right-side junction: splits into two diagonal branches. One extends upward and to the right (+X, +Z) and one extends downward and to the right (+X, -Z). Smooth Y-shaped transitions.
All four resulting branch ends are open ports with visible wall thickness.

design_notes: Single continuous hollow tubular system with a consistent circular outer diameter.
Asymmetric four-port manifold design with left branches in the XY plane and right branches in the XZ plane.
Smooth blended transitions at all junctions; no bulbous nodes, chambers, or spherical swellings.
Mechanically plausible fluid manifold appearance with continuous surfaces and no sharp Boolean seams.
Material finish: Clean brushed metal or matte industrial metal with a semi-gloss industrial look.
